summary: Bug fix verified: Grade Report and Report Card now correctly show grades from AI-graded assignments using token-based name matching. The names_match() helper function properly handles partial names (e.g., 'Paul Figueroa' matches 'Paul J. Figueroa Mendez'). All 19 tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: names_match() helper (server.py:135-155): Token-based matching correctly strips middle initials (like 'J.'), ignores Spanish particles ('de', 'la', etc.), and matches if all submission name parts are in roster OR if 2+ significant parts match - CORRECT
Grade Report query (server.py:2246-2253): Uses $or to search both assignment_id AND ai_assignment_id fields for compatibility - CORRECT
Grade Report name matching (server.py:2285-2289): Uses names_match() instead of substring matching for flexible name comparison - CORRECT
Report Card (server.py:4026-4054): Fetches all graded submissions and matches in Python using names_match() - CORRECT

students_tested: student_test_69652647 (Paul J. Figueroa Mendez) - temporary test data

seed_data_used: Existing graded ai_submissions: Mari Garcia→aiassign_83a2256e (80 pts), Maria Garcia→aiassign_5aa71494 (66 pts)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. The Grade Report and Report Card endpoints now use names_match() for flexible name matching. Test confirms 'Paul Figueroa' matches 'Paul J. Figueroa Mendez'. Both endpoints correctly query $or on assignment_id and ai_assignment_id for ai_submissions collection.

report_card_shows_ai_grades.details: GET /api/report-cards/generate shows 'Tarea (AI)' category with correct points

name_matching_partial_names.details: Paul Figueroa (submission) correctly matched Paul J. Figueroa Mendez (roster) - 1 AI assignment completed, 85 points

name_matching_middle_initials.details: names_match() strips single-character tokens like 'J.' from comparison

grade_report_counts_ai_completed.details: students[].ai_assignments_completed correctly incremented when AI submissions match

report_card_assignment_titles_scores.details: grades[] array includes category, points_earned, points_possible, percentage, assignment_count

bug_rca.root_cause: Previous implementation used substring matching (student_name in submission) which failed when submission name was shorter than roster name (e.g., 'Paul Figueroa' doesn't contain 'Paul J. Figueroa Mendez'). Also, query only searched assignment_id field, missing ai_assignment_id.
fix_applied: 1. Added names_match() helper function for token-based matching at server.py:135-155
2. Grade Report query now uses $or for both assignment_id and ai_assignment_id at server.py:2246-2253
3. Grade Report uses names_match() at server.py:2287
4. Report Card uses names_match() at server.py:4044
bug_rca.verification: Created test student 'Paul J. Figueroa Mendez' and submission from 'Paul Figueroa'. Both Grade Report and Report Card correctly showed the AI grade (85 points) for this student.
